title: For The Love
author: Jen Hatmaker
subline: Trading the 'I should' life for the 'I want' life.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- An open envelope (letter = love note). A heart emerging from it, RED. The flap is open. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1300)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- Envelope: a rectangle with an open flap -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
      <rect x="-300" y="-160" width="600" height="320"/>
      <!-- The open flap as two lines forming an upward V (open) -->
      <line x1="-300" y1="-160" x2="0" y2="40"/>
      <line x1="300" y1="-160" x2="0" y2="40"/>
      <!-- A horizontal hairline showing the back fold -->
      <line x1="-300" y1="-160" x2="300" y2="-160" opacity="0.4"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A heart emerging from the open envelope. RED. -->
    <g transform="translate(0 -100)">
      <path d="M 0 100 Q -120 60 -120 -40 Q -120 -120 -60 -120 Q 0 -120 0 -60 Q 0 -120 60 -120 Q 120 -120 120 -40 Q 120 60 0 100 Z" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A small postmark circle on the envelope -->
    <g transform="translate(-220 100)" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="40"/>
      <text x="0" y="-4" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">LOVE</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Address lines -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
      <line x1="60" y1="60" x2="240" y2="60"/>
      <line x1="60" y1="100" x2="240" y2="100"/>
      <line x1="60" y1="140" x2="200" y2="140"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: An open envelope with a red heart emerging from it — a love note received. Italic 320px title at the bottom because the title itself is informal and intimate. The postmark reads 'LOVE'.
